evals.prompt: Write a post about Kubernetes pod networking fundamentals - how pods communicate within a cluster, Services, and DNS resolution
evals.expected_output: A markdown file at content/posts/kubernetes-pod-networking-fundamentals.md with correct frontmatter, Prerequisites section, code examples with language identifiers, and practical tone

assertions.name: file-location
assertions.description: Post saved to content/posts/ with .md extension

assertions.name: frontmatter-complete
assertions.description: Has all required frontmatter: title, excerpt, category (name+slug), date, publishedAt, updatedAt, readingTime, author (name+slug), tags

assertions.name: valid-category
assertions.description: Category slug is 'kubernetes' (from the valid list)

assertions.name: has-prerequisites
assertions.description: Contains a ## Prerequisites section

assertions.name: code-blocks-labeled
assertions.description: All fenced code blocks have language identifiers (```yaml, ```bash, etc.)

assertions.name: no-emojis
assertions.description: No emojis in post body content

assertions.name: og-image-reminder
assertions.description: Reminds user to run npm run generate:images:parallel

evals.prompt: Write a post about Terraform module best practices for reusable infrastructure
evals.expected_output: A markdown file at content/posts/terraform-module-best-practices.md with correct frontmatter, category terraform, practical code examples in HCL

assertions.name: file-location
assertions.description: Post saved to content/posts/ with .md extension

assertions.name: frontmatter-complete
assertions.description: Has all required frontmatter fields

assertions.name: valid-category
assertions.description: Category slug is 'terraform'

assertions.name: hcl-code-blocks
assertions.description: Contains ```hcl code blocks with Terraform examples

assertions.name: practical-examples
assertions.description: Has real-world module examples, not toy code

assertions.name: reading-time
assertions.description: readingTime field present and reasonable (e.g., '8 min read')

evals.prompt: Create a Docker quiz covering containers, images, networking, volumes, and Dockerfile best practices
evals.expected_output: A JSON file at content/quizzes/docker-quiz.json with 15+ questions, correct theme (blue), valid structure

assertions.name: valid-json
assertions.description: Output is valid JSON

assertions.name: file-location
assertions.description: Saved to content/quizzes/ with .json extension

assertions.name: theme-correct
assertions.description: Theme uses blue colors (from-blue-500, to-cyan-600) for Docker

assertions.name: 15-questions-min
assertions.description: Has at least 15 questions

assertions.name: all-have-situation
assertions.description: Every question has a situation field

assertions.name: all-have-codeExample
assertions.description: Every question has a codeExample field

assertions.name: totalPoints-matches
assertions.description: totalPoints equals sum of all question points

assertions.name: difficultyLevels-match
assertions.description: difficultyLevels counts match actual question difficulties

assertions.name: valid-correctAnswer
assertions.description: All correctAnswer values are 0-3

assertions.name: difficulty-mix
assertions.description: Mix of beginner, intermediate, and advanced questions

evals.prompt: Create a Linux fundamentals quiz covering file permissions, processes, networking commands, and shell scripting
evals.expected_output: A JSON file at content/quizzes/linux-quiz.json with correct gray theme, 15+ questions

assertions.name: valid-json
assertions.description: Output is valid JSON

assertions.name: theme-correct
assertions.description: Theme uses gray colors for Linux

assertions.name: 15-questions-min
assertions.description: Has at least 15 questions

assertions.name: explanations-teach
assertions.description: Explanations are educational (50+ chars), not just 'correct answer is X'

assertions.name: no-duplicate-ids
assertions.description: No duplicate question IDs

assertions.name: plausible-wrong-answers
assertions.description: Wrong options are plausible, not obviously wrong

evals.prompt: Create an exercise about setting up Kubernetes Horizontal Pod Autoscaler with custom metrics
evals.expected_output: A JSON file at content/exercises/kubernetes-hpa-custom-metrics.json with steps, troubleshooting, completion criteria

assertions.name: valid-json
assertions.description: Output is valid JSON

assertions.name: file-location
assertions.description: Saved to content/exercises/ with .json extension

assertions.name: has-steps
assertions.description: Has 6-10 steps

assertions.name: steps-have-required
assertions.description: All steps have id, title, description

assertions.name: has-troubleshooting
assertions.description: Has troubleshooting array with 3+ items

assertions.name: has-completionCriteria
assertions.description: Has completionCriteria array with 3+ items

assertions.name: valid-category
assertions.description: Category has name and slug matching valid categories

assertions.name: has-learningObjectives
assertions.description: Has learningObjectives with action verbs

evals.prompt: Create a beginner exercise for building a multi-container app with Docker Compose
evals.expected_output: A JSON file at content/exercises/docker-compose-multi-container.json with beginner difficulty, 30-45 min estimated time

assertions.name: valid-json
assertions.description: Output is valid JSON

assertions.name: difficulty-beginner
assertions.description: difficulty is 'beginner'

assertions.name: time-appropriate
assertions.description: estimatedTime is in 30-45 min range for beginner

assertions.name: environment-local
assertions.description: environment is 'local' or 'container' (Docker runs locally)

assertions.name: progressive-steps
assertions.description: Steps build progressively from setup to verification

assertions.name: has-resources
assertions.description: Has resources array (can be empty but field exists)
